why_we_would: A reasonable P0 would frame this as a stress-test of P2's suspicious Seer claim: P2 vouched for P4, so if P4 flips wolf the fake seer is exposed and the game ends perfectly (score 1.0). The branch also has a resilient floor — in 93% of worlds the wolf is still caught on Day 2 via renormalized belief, keeping expected value at 0.588 despite the gamble.
risks: 97% of the time this vote kills an innocent on Day 1 and hands the wolf a free night kill, and the branch's upside comes almost entirely from Day-2 recovery rather than the vote itself; in the P1-wolf world (4%) it collapses to total loss (0.0).
